race.comment: SILENT FOX (3) was an impressive maiden winner last time out, scoring by 3 lengths over 1200m at Toowoomba. Nicely drawn on the fence and he can go right on with it now. WAX ON WAX OFF (10) made progress last time out, finishing 3.5 lengths from the winner in second at the end of 1050m at Rockhampton after being in contention on the corner. Finds a suitable race and can find the winner's circle. THE BOSS MAN (9) stepping out at this circuit for the first time. Last appeared when he finished eighth over 1300m at Toowoomba on March 7. Fitter third up and a threat. WEST CORK (5) last appeared four months ago when he finished 3.5 lengths from the winner in seventh over 1680m at Ipswich. Can make an impact fresh.
